product_brief: A cybersecurity platform built for OT environments delivering network monitoring, asset visibility, and threat detection.
pqc_capability_description: Not stated. The document focuses on OT security monitoring, asset inventory, vulnerability management, and threat detection but contains no mention of Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC), quantum-resistant algorithms, or migration plans.
architecture_type: Hybrid deployment supporting physical sensor appliances, virtual sensors, lightweight agents on Windows devices, and containerized traffic forwarding (LWC). Includes centralized aggregation via SiteStore and optional CentralStore for multi-enterprise management.
primary_platforms: Windows-based devices (for Dragos Agent), Containerized and edge computing environments, Physical sensor appliances, Virtual sensors. Integrates with SIEMs (Microsoft Sentinel), Firewalls (Fortinet, Cisco, CheckPoint, Palo Alto Networks), EDR (CrowdStrike), and CMDB (ServiceNow).
target_industries: Industrial Control Systems (ICS), Operational Technology (OT), Critical Infrastructure, Manufacturing, Energy, Water, Transportation (implied by "industrial infrastructure" and "civilization").

product_brief: Ruggedized next-generation firewalls (NGFW) designed for mission-critical industrial and OT environments.
pqc_capability_description: The document does not mention Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC), quantum-resistant algorithms, or any plans for PQC migration. It mentions standard cryptographic functions like IPsec VPN acceleration and TLS 1.3 inspection but does not specify quantum-safe primitives.
crypto_primitives: Not stated (Document mentions "cryptographic keys", "IPsec VPN", "TLS 1.3", and "SSL inspection" but does not list specific algorithms like ECDSA, RSA, or AES).
key_management_model: Hardware-based security using a Trusted Platform Module (TPM) for generating, storing, and authenticating cryptographic keys.
architecture_type: Ruggedized Appliance (Hardware firewall with inline deployment capabilities)
latest_version: 7.6.0 (Referenced in the document library header as "DOCUMENT LIBRARY 7.6.0")
primary_platforms: FortiOS operating system; Physical Rugged Appliance, Virtual device, Container, Cloud service
target_industries: Industrial Control System (ICS), Operational Technology (OT), Manufacturing
